metadata.generatedFrom: Buyout Log workbook source extraction plus closed target architecture

sourceFiles.description: Company buyout log template; source field inventory and seed buyout taxonomy, not final UX contract

metadata.activationPolicy: No workbook row is treated as an active live buyout record unless it represents a verified project-specific buyout scope or imported/linked Procore commitment/budget condition. Template rows seed taxonomy, fields, cost-code structure, examples, and import rules only.

projectHeaderFields.mappingNotes: Display and mapping field; source labeled.
May be supported by Procore/Sage project profile.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Identifies the buyout scope, CSI division, cost-code description, or template taxonomy row.
recordFields.mappingNotes: May be split into csiDivision, costCode, and costCodeDescription during import. Division header rows remain taxonomy only.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Stores the selected vendor/subcontractor name before or alongside Procore/Sage vendor linkage.
recordFields.mappingNotes: If linked to Procore, store procoreCompanyId. If linked to Sage, store sageVendorId. Conflicts create PROCORE_VENDOR_MISMATCH or SAGE_ACCOUNTING_MISMATCH.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: PCC buyout amount used for buyout workflow until replaced or reconciled against Procore commitment amount.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Once linked to Procore commitment, Procore amount is read-only source value; PCC amount remains workflow/planning value unless closed by reconciliation.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Original budget value used to compare award/contract amount to starting budget baseline.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Source must be labeled. If Sage is integrated, Sage is accounting truth. If Procore is the source, label as operational budget context.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Calculated variance between PCC award/contract amount and original budget.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Formula: pccAwardAmount - originalBudgetAmount. Dashboard default should also include buyoutVsCurrentBudget.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Target date for sending letter of intent / notice to proceed.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Used for stale/late LOI Priority Action generation.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Date the LOI is returned executed.
Summary of submittal dates supporting procurement readiness.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Detailed implementation should normalize into ProcurementMilestone records and Procore submittal links where available.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Captures procurement or fabrication lead time used to determine order-by and ROJ risk.
recordFields.mappingNotes: May be represented as leadTimeDays plus leadTimeNotes.
Default to derived from selectedVendorName; local extraction must verify if this column has distinct workbook usage.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Current person or role responsible for next action.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Primary source for Priority Action ownership and stale BIC signal.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Tracks subcontractor default insurance requirement/enrollment posture.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Normalize into ComplianceRequirement when SDI is required.

recordFields.fieldPurpose: Tracks whether bond is required and whether missing bond should block buyout completion.
recordFields.mappingNotes: Normalize into ComplianceRequirement when bond is required.
Comments should not replace structured exception or reconciliation fields.

defaultBuyoutLineItems.mappingNotes: Representative seed taxonomy; local workbook extraction must replace/confirm exact rows.

ambiguousItems.issue: Exact workbook row inventory must be re-extracted from the local repo-resident workbook.
ambiguousItems.recommendedResolution: Use openpyxl in Prompt 01/05 and update defaultBuyoutLineItems with exact row references before commit.
